## Version Bump

<!-- Check exactly one. The version-bump workflow will update VERSION automatically. -->

- [ ] `patch` — bug fixes, small updates
- [ ] `minor` — new features, non-breaking
- [ ] `major` — breaking changes
- [ ] `none` — docs, chore, no version change
